title: PyTorch Tensor Operations
short_description: Learn what a tensor is and practise the core operations -- creation, shape, reshape, indexing, reduction, broadcasting, and matrix multiplication.
learning_objectives: Understand what a tensor is (an n-dimensional array with a shape and dtype)
Create tensors and inspect shape, ndim, numel, and dtype
Use broadcasting to combine tensors of different shapes
Tell matrix multiplication apart from element-wise multiplication
